Class PreBuiltShipCommand

java.lang.Object
Controller.Commands.Command
Controller.Commands.PreBuiltShipCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PreBuiltShipCommand extends Command
Command for selecting a pre-built ship during the building phase. Players can choose from a list of pre-defined ships.
See Also:

      private final int index

  • Constructor Details

    • PreBuiltShipCommand

      public PreBuiltShipCommand(String playerName, int index)
      Constructs a new PreBuiltShipCommand.
      Parameters:
      playerName - the name of the player selecting the ship
      index - the index of the pre-built ship to select

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public void execute(Controller controller) throws InvalidCommand, InvalidParameters
      Executes the pre-built ship command by calling the controller's preBuiltShip method.
      Specified by:
      execute in class Command
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller to execute the command on
      Throws:
      InvalidCommand - if the command is invalid
      InvalidParameters - if the parameters are invalid

      Gets the index of the pre-built ship.

      the index of the pre-built ship
